script_text: Where does the comma go? I went to the store ___ I bought a book.
Use a comma before a conjunction in a compound sentence!
How do you write a book title?
Most words in a title get capitalized!
The comma goes inside the quotation marks!
Names and places always get capitals!
Which is the correct possessive: That is the ___ ball.
Apostrophe + S shows one dog owns it!
